facilities.name: Community Hall
facilities.description: Main community hall for events, functions, and gatherings (recreational use).

policy.chargesInfo:
Community Hall rental (per Management Committee Resolution, Item 2 — Community Hall Rules, passed unanimously on 21 June 2026):

  • ₹5,000 base rental for a booking of up to 4 hours.
  • ₹1,500 per hour (or part thereof) for every extra hour beyond 4 hours.

Payment must be made to the Society Manager before the booking is confirmed. This supersedes the earlier flat ₹1,500 charge announced on 1 June 2026; the manager-coordination process from that notice continues to apply.

rateCard.label: Base rental (up to 4 hours)
rateCard.note: Payable to the Society Manager. Booking confirmed only after payment.

rateCard.label: Overtime (per hour beyond 4 h)
rateCard.note: Charged for every extra hour or part thereof.

rateCard.label: Booking & maintenance charge (per event)
rateCard.note: Covers post-event cleaning, housekeeping and bulk garbage collection. Payable to the Society Manager.

priceHistory.note: Flat ₹1,500 per-event charge introduced to fund post-event cleaning, housekeeping and bulk garbage collection. Superseded by the 21 June 2026 AGM resolution.

rateCard.label: Base rental (up to 4 hours)
rateCard.note: Payable to the Society Manager. Booking confirmed only after payment.

rateCard.label: Overtime (per hour beyond 4 h)
rateCard.note: Charged for every extra hour or part thereof.

priceHistory.source: AGM / Committee Resolution, Item 2 — Community Hall Rules (21 June 2026, passed unanimously)
priceHistory.note: Current rate. ₹5,000 base rental for a booking of up to 4 hours; ₹1,500 per hour (or part thereof) for every extra hour beyond 4 hours. Supersedes the 1 June 2026 flat ₹1,500 charge.

before: Confirm the booking is approved before decorating or setting up.
Bring your own decor, cutlery and serving equipment.
Check the space and report any pre-existing damage to the manager.
Keep music volume moderate; no loud music after 10 PM.
after: Clear all decorations, food and personal items.
Sweep the floor and wipe down tables and chairs.
Segregate wet and dry waste; drop it at the designated bin.
Switch off fans, lights and AC before leaving.
Return chairs and tables to their original positions.

rules: All bookings must be coordinated through the Society Manager (Management Committee notice, 1 June 2026).
Bookings must be requested at least 48 hours in advance.
Rental: ₹5,000 for up to 4 hours + ₹1,500 per extra hour (or part thereof), payable to the Society Manager before the booking is confirmed (Committee Resolution, Item 2 — Community Hall Rules).
Cleanliness of the hall is the responsibility of the booking owner.
Any damage to property will be recovered from the security deposit.
Existing reservations made via the earlier Google Form remain valid, but residents must complete the booking formalities (recording + payment) with the Society Manager.

facilities.name: Gym Area
facilities.description: Society gym for private slot bookings (personal training, group session).

policy.chargesInfo: Personal-use gym slot bookings are complimentary and included with your maintenance. NOTE: any functions, gatherings or events held in the Gym Area (not personal workouts) must instead be coordinated through the Society Manager. Applicable charges will be advised by the manager at the time of booking.

before: Bring your own towel and water bottle.
Check equipment for damage; report issues to the manager before use.
after: Wipe down every machine and mat you used.
Rack all weights to their correct spots.
Turn off the AC, fans and TV before leaving.

rules: Minor residents (below 16) must be accompanied by an adult.
No outside trainers without prior written approval from the committee.
Personal music must be played through headphones.
